retry_reason: kref_put either safely decrements the refcount or triggers the release callback; retrying after a call would risk a double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases one reference on a batadv_tvlv_handler object. Safe to call with NULL (no-op). After the last reference is released, the release function batadv_tvlv_handler_release is invoked to free the object. The caller must not use the handler after this call, as it may have been freed.
